center.name: Barragem de Poilão
center.summary: Barragem de Poilão是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Cape Verde warbler，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2005 |title=Discovery of Cape Verde Warbler Acrocephalus brevipennis on Fogo, Cape Verde Islands |journal=Bulletin of the African Bird Club |volume=12 |issue=3|pages=147–149 |doi=10.5962/p.309752 |doi-access=free }} and further survey found it was widespread across the north of the island up to altitudes of about 1,300 m. On Santiago it can be found across the whole island, including in Barragem de Poilão, [[São Jorge dos Órgãos|S
